response.justification: Maria has extensive full-stack experience with strong TypeScript, React, and Node.js skills, but her background is heavily skewed toward senior/principal roles rather than entry-level or mid-level individual contributor roles. While she meets the core technical requirements, her lack of direct experience with PostgreSQL, AWS services (beyond basic usage), and her overqualification for the role may introduce challenges in alignment with team dynamics and long-term growth expectations.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and full-stack development experience with Node.js, React, and Nest.js equivalents
Experience with relational databases (MySQL, SQL) and scalable architecture in high-load environments
Proven ability to learn new technologies quickly and mentor others, aligning with the role's emphasis on collaboration
concerns: Overqualified for the junior/mid-level role, potentially leading to mismatched expectations or role dissatisfaction
Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL (primarily MongoDB and MySQL), which is a required skill
Minimal exposure to AWS services (only basic usage) and Kubernetes (only in open-source projects), which are nice-to-haves
